name: Ukuvimbela I-Hypothermia (H -- MARCH)
description: I-Combat hypothermia ingumbulali ohamba phambili ovinjelwa ekuhlukumezeni. I-triad ebulalayo: hypothermia + acidosis + coagulopathy. Vimbela ngazo zonke izindleko.
steps: Susa zonke izingubo ezimanzi ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka.
Mboza isiguli ngengubo ebonisa ukushisa (isikhala) -- uhlangothi olucwebezelayo IN olubheke esigulini.
Goqa ikhanda nentamo (indawo ebalulekile yokulahlekelwa ukushisa).
Faka i-insulate kusuka emhlabathini -- beka okuthile phakathi kwesiguli nendawo ebandayo.
Faka uketshezi olufudumele lwe-IV uma lukhona.
Ungavumeli isiguli siqhaqhazele ngaphandle kokumboza -- ukuqhaqhazela kuwuphawu lwesixwayiso sangaphambi kwesikhathi.
Gada izinga lokushisa uma i-thermometer ikhona. Ngaphansi kuka-35°C (95°F) = hypothermia.
warnings: I-Hypothermia iba yimbi kakhulu i-coagulopathy -- iziguli ezophayo ziphola ngokushesha futhi zihluleke ngokuyimpumelelo.
Ukuvimbela i-Field hypothermia kufanele kuqale endaweni yokulimala, hhayi ku-CCP.
